_meta.production_status: ✅ LIVE — reward display consistency P0-P4 + git cleanup (6632d02)
_meta.bundle_status: ✅ ~471 KB JS, ~141 KB gzip main chunks (within budget)

tasks.title: Daily Monitoring Dashboard Setup
tasks.description: Configure real-time monitoring for production app
acceptance_criteria: GA4 dashboard created with game_start, level_complete, score_submitted events
Sentry alerts configured (error threshold = 5+ per day)
Uptime monitoring set (alert on HTTP 5xx or timeout >10s)
tasks.definition_of_done: Monitoring active, first alert received (test), dashboard shared with team

tasks.title: Mobile Smoke Test (iOS + Android)
tasks.description: Verify game works on real mobile devices
acceptance_criteria: iOS (iPhone 12+): EntryGate loads, touch input works, game boots Level 1
Network: All API calls 200 OK (leaderboard, score submission)
tasks.definition_of_done: Screenshot proof from both devices, signed-off in handoff

tasks.title: Lead Capture Verification
tasks.description: Verify Bouwpas registration → email pipeline works
acceptance_criteria: Verify email received in inbox within 5 minutes
Verify record in database (SELECT from uhqsycwpjz_app)
tasks.definition_of_done: Email received, database record confirmed, logged in handoff

tasks.title: Team Handoff & Knowledge Transfer
tasks.description: Ensure team understands production setup and runbook
tasks.definition_of_done: Team members can navigate handoffs, know who to call, meeting notes saved

tasks.title: Bundle Size Regression Check
tasks.description: Verify no unintended bundle bloat introduced post-P1
tasks.definition_of_done: Bundle budget verified, trend graphed (add to monitoring)

tasks.title: Web Vitals Baseline (LCP, CLS, INP)
tasks.description: Capture production performance metrics for trend analysis
acceptance_criteria: npm run lighthouse:ci executed on main
tasks.definition_of_done: Metrics logged in spreadsheet for monthly tracking

tasks.title: GA4 Metrics Review & Alerts
tasks.description: Analyze player behavior, identify anomalies, set thresholds
tasks.definition_of_done: Spreadsheet created, alerts set in GA4, weekly review scheduled

tasks.title: Code Review Checklist Creation
tasks.description: Document standards for all future PRs to main
acceptance_criteria: Covers: tests, lint, build, scope (1-1-1), secrets, pre-commit
tasks.definition_of_done: Checklist used on next PR, feedback collected

tasks.title: Create Q3 2026 Feature Plan Document
tasks.description: High-level roadmap with priorities, effort estimates, dependencies
tasks.definition_of_done: Plan shared with team, sprint backlog populated from MUST items

tasks.title: Technical Debt Audit & Prioritization
tasks.description: Review open items (P2-2, P2-3, SG), decide keep/defer
acceptance_criteria: P2-2 Polish (CSS, a11y): Keep in backlog or DEFER?
SG Pixel-art: Status on Adobe delivery?
New tech debt items identified from production
tasks.definition_of_done: Debt backlog updated in todo.json, rationale documented

tasks.title: Quarterly Review Meeting (Dowódca Sync)
tasks.description: Align on Q3 goals, resource allocation, risks

future_features.title: Leaderboard UX Polish (Seasonal Features)
future_features.description: Improve leaderboard UI: season selector, rank progress, tie-breaker clarification
future_features.definition_of_done: E2E tests pass, design reviewed, deployed to prod

future_features.title: Lead Capture Rate Optimization (A/B Test CTA)
future_features.description: Test button copy, form fields, incentives to increase Bouwpas registration

future_features.title: Mobile Keyboard Handling (EntryGate Form)
future_features.description: Prevent keyboard from covering form on mobile; improve input experience
acceptance_criteria: Form scrolls into view when keyboard open
future_features.definition_of_done: Tested on real devices (iPhone 12+, Galaxy S20+), no regress

future_features.title: P2-2: CSS Consistency & Accessibility Audit (WCAG AA)
future_features.description: Polish pass: standardize CSS tokens, verify WCAG AA, final UX touches
future_features.deferred_reason: App already meets AA compliance; low ROI for detailed polish

future_features.title: P2-3: Performance Optimization (FPS, Memory, Bundle)
future_features.description: Deep performance work: heap snapshots, FPS profiling, code-splitting
acceptance_criteria: 60 FPS sustained on mobile (profile with DevTools)
future_features.definition_of_done: Performance report with trends, optimizations backlogged
future_features.deferred_reason: Performance already sufficient; improvements would be incremental

future_features.title: Sprint G: Pixel-Art Assets (Adobe Delivery)
future_features.description: Replace emoji with hand-drawn pixel-art sprites (awaiting Adobe delivery)
future_features.definition_of_done: Deployed to prod, visual polish approved

risk_register.title: Adobe Asset Delivery Delay (SG Sprint)
risk_register.mitigation: Weekly check-in with design; fallback: use current emoji longer

risk_register.title: Turnstile Rate Limiting on Lead Form
risk_register.mitigation: Monitor Turnstile API quota; increase limits with Cloudflare if needed

risk_register.title: Mobile Layout Breakage (New Android/iOS Version)
risk_register.mitigation: Weekly device testing; monitor Sentry for layout errors

risk_register.title: Server Downtime (Cyber-Folks Infrastructure)
risk_register.mitigation: Status monitoring; escalation to Cyber-Folks SLA 4-hour

dependencies.reason: Q3 plan requires tech debt prioritization first
Review meeting needs updated plan + decisions
Monitoring must be active before metrics review
Pixel-art lift visual quality across entire game

archive.note: Historical sprints (S5c-S13, P0-P1) documented in docs/archive/ and handoffs/
